message:
fix(dcg): sync config from persistent storage before updates

- Remove unused dcgPendingExceptions import from dcg-ru-integration.service.ts
- Add syncConfigFromPersistent() calls before updateConfig, enablePack, disablePack
- Prevents race conditions when multiple operations modify config

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
